jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 1mg - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
